title: Millbrook Fasteners, Inc.
description: 70-year-old precision fastener manufacturer with strong regional OEM relationships, healthy margins, and an ERP system that predated the iPhone. The founder's retirement was somewhat optional at time of close. It is no longer.

title: Summit Printing Solutions
description: Regional commercial print network acquired at 5.2x adjusted EBITDA. Strong recurring contracts with municipal and healthcare clients. Their former branding was, in retrospect, somewhat ironic.

title: Cascade Lawn & Landscape
description: 40-location lawn care and landscape maintenance franchise system. Recurring residential and HOA contracts, strong seasonal cash conversion, and franchisees who were genuinely delighted to have institutional support. Most still are.

title: Heritage Bakery Brands
description: Three regional bakery chains unified under a single holding structure. The signature croissant recipe remains unchanged and always will. The commissary labor model is another matter entirely.

title: ProVantage Staffing Group
description: Managed workforce provider serving light industrial and logistics clients. High volume, consistent spread, and a churn model that — when viewed through the correct lens — is actually a feature of the business rather than a concern.

title: Lakeshore Environmental Services
description: Environmental waste handling and remediation services under long-term municipal contracts. Steady, recession-resistant cash flows — because regardless of the economic cycle, municipalities continue to produce waste.

title: Tri-State Packaging Corp.
description: Corrugated packaging manufacturer with regional distribution to consumer goods and e-commerce clients. The world will continue to need boxes. We own some of the people who make them.

title: Vanguard Home Security
description: Residential security monitoring with 98,000 contracted subscribers. Cancellation fees are structurally robust. Churn is within acceptable parameters. The monitoring infrastructure is fully owned. Everything is fine.

title: Midwest Dental Partners
description: Dental services organization with 22 locations across three states. Strong per-chair economics, resilient patient volumes, and waiting room reading material we are actively in the process of modernizing.

title: Clearfield Auto Holdings
description: 18-location auto body and collision repair platform. Insurance direct-repair relationships provide consistent volume. Customer relationships tend to be involuntary in nature, which is consistent with the underlying demand driver.

title: Northbrook HVAC Collective
description: Commercial and residential HVAC services across 6 markets. Summer and winter are both peak revenue seasons. Spring and fall are reserved for planning the next acquisition in the vertical.

title: Irongate Distribution
description: B2B distribution of industrial and maintenance supplies across the Mid-Atlantic. The trucks are leased. The customer contracts are not. Favorable working capital dynamics and a sales force that finally has institutional backing.
